focus_points.label: How she’s landing in team rituals now
focus_points.reason: Whether her engagement drop is tied to the decision she was passed over, or just a temporary dip in energy—worth clarifying what changed for her day to day.

focus_points.label: The readout on why she wasn’t selected
focus_points.reason: Whether she got a concrete, direct explanation for the gap and what she thinks the bar is—so you can confirm the facts and close any unanswered questions.

focus_points.label: Whether mentoring is strategic growth work
focus_points.reason: What she wants to build next may be showing up through mentoring, or she may be using it to park energy after feeling blocked—worth clarifying which it is and what outcomes she wants from it.

focus_points.label: What “next-level” looks like for her
focus_points.reason: What she needs to see to feel confident about the next step—scope, expectations, and the specific bar for Principal-to-next—so her plan is actionable rather than abstract.
